entities.name: DIKW Frame
entities.context: framework categorizing data, information, knowledge, and wisdom

entities.name: Data
entities.context: first tier of DIKW, representing raw inputs

entities.name: Information
entities.context: second tier of DIKW, representing organized content

entities.name: Knowledge
entities.context: third tier of DIKW, representing synthesized insights

entities.name: Wisdom
entities.context: fourth tier of DIKW, representing core principles and frameworks

entities.name: Content Library
entities.context: tool capturing information in the system

entities.name: Sacred Texts
entities.context: tool capturing wisdom in the system

entities.name: Stances/Beliefs
entities.context: normative layer between Knowledge and Wisdom

relationships.context: using the DIKW framework in knowledge system
Data is the first tier of DIKW
